name: chr19_19q13_41_FCGBP_SD
description: 19q13.41 SD region containing FCGBP (Fc-gamma binding protein, ~570 kDa mucin-like gut protein), CEACAM-related paralogs (transitioning into the CEA cluster) and SIGLEC/CD33-related paralog blocks at 19q13.41-q13.42. Short SDs flank each paralog.

architecture.internal_structure: FCGBP at the centre, flanked by CEACAM-related and SIGLEC paralog tandem clusters at 85-95% identity; SD blocks of 10-50 kb; intra-chromosomal duplicons to the 19q13.33 ZNF tail.

related_diseases: Inflammatory and infectious disease susceptibility (SIGLEC variation)
